title: NHKマイルCの後に・宙吊り

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Agnes Tachyon crossing the finish line, in
a tremendous display of dominance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be the living embodiment of an enigma,
but her running never ceases to amaze me.
choice_data_list: (I'll never get tired of seeing you run!)
(I'll never get tired of seeing you run!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see... This is... truly fascinating.
choice_data_list: Well done! You ran like the wind!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. You're in a fine mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, she didn't run in the Japanese Derby,
the race I originally suggested to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean I should abandon the rest
of our agenda. I still want her to run in the Kikuka
Sho.
choice_data_list: Next, let's enter the Kikuka Sho!
Next, let's enter the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho G1 race is the next up in your
agenda, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm. It is a fine goal! However...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, I'd like it if you didn't place
too much faith in me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What does she mean by that? In any case, it
seems our goal hasn't changed... for the time
being.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this uncertainty lingering in the back of
my mind, our days training for the Kikuka Sho
begin in earnest!
